title: andropogon asthenos
intro: Andropogon asthenos, also known as bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Andropogon asthenos can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
